sentence: 妈妈今天煮了山药排骨汤。
pinyin: Māma jīntiān zhǔ le shānyào páigǔ tāng.
english: Mom made yam and pork rib soup today.

sentence: 近几年居民的购买力明显增强了。
pinyin: Jìn jǐ nián jūmín de gòumǎilì míngxiǎn zēngqiáng le.
english: Residents' purchasing power has increased noticeably in recent years.

sentence: 这台收音机能收到多个波段。
pinyin: Zhè tái shōuyīnjī néng shōudào duō gè bōduàn.
english: This radio can receive multiple wave bands.

sentence: 明天下午可以看到日食。
english: A solar eclipse can be seen tomorrow afternoon.

sentence: 他把土地使用权转让给了邻居。
pinyin: Tā bǎ tǔdì shǐyòngquán zhuǎnràng gěi le línjū.
english: He transferred the land usage rights to his neighbor.
